TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions
TABLE.COMMENT: Main table for Conference Submissions activity instances

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this activity belongs to

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity name

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Activity description shown on course page

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Format of the intro field

FIELD.NAME: timeopen
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp submissions open; 0 means no restriction

FIELD.NAME: timeclose
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp submissions close; 0 means no restriction

FIELD.NAME: titlelimit
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum title length; 0 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: titlelimittype
FIELD.COMMENT: chars or words

FIELD.NAME: abstractlimit
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum abstract length; 0 means unlimited

FIELD.NAME: abstractlimittype
FIELD.COMMENT: chars or words

FIELD.NAME: conferencestart
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp the conference starts; 0 means unset. Not required (unlike mod_confscheduler's own field of the same name) -- only used here to generate the day range for offerpreferreddates' checkboxes

FIELD.NAME: conferenceend
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp the conference ends; 0 means unset

FIELD.NAME: offerpreferreddates
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the submission form offers a submitter a set of preferred-date checkboxes (one per day in the conferencestart/conferenceend range), all checked by default. Requires both conference dates to be set

FIELD.NAME: disableddates
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated local-midnight timestamps (a subset of api::get_conference_days()'s range) that a regular submitter is not offered as a preferred date; a user with mod/confsubmissions:manageform (editingteacher+) still sees and can select every day, disabled or not. Null/empty means no day is disabled

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_track
TABLE.COMMENT: Submission tracks used to categorise submissions for review and scheduling

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissions
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions table

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Track name

FIELD.NAME: colour
FIELD.COMMENT: Hex colour (e.g. #3366cc) used to theme this track, matching mod_confscheduler's confscheduler_room.colour convention; null means no theme/default styling

FIELD.NAME: icon
FIELD.COMMENT: Machine key of a curated icon (see confsubmissions_track_icon_options() in lib.php), rendered as a Font Awesome class; null/empty means no icon. Not free text: values are validated against the fixed allow-list before being stored

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_submissiontype
TABLE.COMMENT: Presentation types (e.g. Lightning Talk, Workshop) organisers configure per instance, each with a default duration in minutes

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissions
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions table

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Submission type name, e.g. Lightning Talk, Workshop, Keynote

FIELD.NAME: durationminutes
FIELD.COMMENT: Default presentation length in minutes for a submission of this type. Consumed by mod_confscheduler as the initial block length when a presentation of this type is first dragged into the grid or placed by the autoscheduler; the organiser can still resize an individual scheduled block afterwards (dragging its resize handle), which does not change this setting or retroactively affect other submissions of the same type

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_field
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-instance organiser-defined optional fields, each freely named with a chosen field type (Revision round 1 follow-up, 2026-07-04 -- previously a fixed, closed set of three checkboxes)

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissions
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions table

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Organiser-chosen display label, e.g. Company/affiliation, Preferred session length

FIELD.NAME: type
FIELD.COMMENT: One of the keys returned by confsubmissions_field_types() in lib.php: text, textarea, menu, checkbox, date, number, url

FIELD.NAME: options
FIELD.COMMENT: Newline-separated choice list, used only when type = menu; null/unused for every other type

FIELD.NAME: required
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether a presenter must answer this field to submit

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_submission
TABLE.COMMENT: Presenter submissions (title, abstract, track) for a call for abstracts

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissions
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions table

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The user who submitted this abstract

FIELD.NAME: title
FIELD.COMMENT: Submission title

FIELD.NAME: abstract
FIELD.COMMENT: Submission abstract text

FIELD.NAME: trackid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_track table; null if unassigned

FIELD.NAME: submissiontypeid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_submissiontype table; null if unassigned (e.g. the instance has no submission types configured, or this submission predates this feature)

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: Workflow status, e.g. submitted, accepted, rejected

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_speaker
TABLE.COMMENT: Speakers (primary presenter and co-presenters) attached to a submission

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_submission table

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Set when the speaker is an enrolled Moodle user

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Set when the speaker was entered manually by name

FIELD.NAME: email
FIELD.COMMENT: Set when the speaker was entered manually by email

FIELD.NAME: role
FIELD.COMMENT: primary or co-presenter

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_fieldval
TABLE.COMMENT: Submitter answers to an instance's organiser-defined optional fields

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_submission table

FIELD.NAME: fieldid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_field table

FIELD.NAME: value
FIELD.COMMENT: The submitter's answer, as a string; a date is stored as its unix timestamp, a checkbox as '0'/'1'

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_datepref
TABLE.COMMENT: A submitter's preferred conference days for a submission, only meaningful when the instance has offerpreferreddates enabled. Absence of any row for a submission means no preference was ever recorded (e.g. the feature was off at submission time) -- callers must treat that as 'any day is fine', not 'no day is fine'

FIELD.NAME: submissionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions_submission table

FIELD.NAME: prefdate
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp of local midnight for the preferred calendar day

TABLE.NAME: confsubmissions_notiftemplate
TABLE.COMMENT: Organiser-edited notification templates (email subject/body) for this instance's own notification events

FIELD.NAME: confsubmissions
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to confsubmissions table

FIELD.NAME: notiftype
FIELD.COMMENT: One of local\notifier::NOTIF_TYPES ('created', 'withdrawn'); enforced in PHP

FIELD.NAME: subject
FIELD.COMMENT: Notification email subject, with embeddable placeholder fields (e.g. [[fullname]], [[submissiontitle]]); null/blank falls back to a built-in default

FIELD.NAME: body
FIELD.COMMENT: Notification email body, same placeholder syntax as subject; null/blank falls back to a built-in default

FIELD.NAME: bodyformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Standard Moodle text-format field for the body column, same convention as this plugin's own introformat field

INDEX.NAME: confsubmissionstype
INDEX.COMMENT: At most one template per notification type per instance
